form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 8 at this track Cl2 April 18 over 1620m, soft track; 4 len behind Ralph The Rocket carrying 56kg at $2.90. When resuming last campaign ninth of 12 at this track Cl1 December 4 2024 over 1200m, soft track; 7 len behind Stars In The Night with 58kg at $26. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin, laid in, in the home straight.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 4th of 9 at this track Cl1 on March 27 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Who's In Dev with 56.5kg at $3.20. The start before that 4th of 11 at this track Cl1 on February 20 over 1200m, 2 len behind Novalargo carrying 58.5kg at $3.60. Not far away last time. Meets winner better at the weights and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.3 len at this track Cl1 March 27 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Windara Wolf with 55kg at $3.60. The race before that led but faded 2nd of 11 at this track Cl1 on March 13 over 1400m, slow going 1.5 len behind Quafftide with 57.5kg at $4.20. In great form and will take catching again.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of five months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Hobart Bm60 November 4 over 2020m, soft track; 7 len behind Don't Give Up with 56kg at $8. Previously first up; second of 11 at Hobart Mdn-Sw November 5 2024 over 1430m, a head behind Navarre River carrying 56.5kg at $3. Placed 4/6 this trip and can run into the finish fresh.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of four months. Finished off last campaign fourth of 7 at Devonport Synthetic Bm68 December 19 over 1880m, 2.25 len behind Original Glaze with 54kg at $12. First up last campaign second of 11 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw February 15 2025 over 1300m, a head behind Mail Order with 57.5kg at $13. Has ability and has placed 2/2 fresh.

form.formComment: At the latest run came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a nose at this track Mdn-Sw March 27 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Arianna's Gold carrying 56.5kg at $12. The race before that 9th of 13 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1600m, on a slow track; 21 len behind Veins Within Rock with 56.5kg at $18. Off the mark now but would need to improve further.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months won by 1.5 len at Hobart Cl1 March 22 over 1100m defeating Crystal Moonbeam with 54kg at $5.50. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Moruya Cl1 on January 5 over 1425m, 2.75 len behind Wish You Were Here carrying 55kg at $8. Big winner fresh and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently 2nd of 10 at Hobart Bm60 on March 22 over 1200m, 0.8 len behind Volkanovski with 53kg at $18. The start before that 4th in a small field at Hobart Bm68 on February 15 over 1430m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Araya Sunshine with 54kg at $13. Close to a win. Just missed latest and will go close with a repeat.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Might struggle again.
